SEARCH
Package io.papermc.paper.plugin.lifecycle.event.handler.configuration

Interface LifecycleEventHandlerConfiguration<O extends LifecycleEventOwner>

Type Parameters:
O -
All Known Subinterfaces:
MonitorLifecycleEventHandlerConfiguration<O>, PrioritizedLifecycleEventHandlerConfiguration<O>, RegistryEntryAddConfiguration<T>
@Experimental @NullMarked @NonExtendable public interface LifecycleEventHandlerConfiguration<O extends LifecycleEventOwner>
Base type for constructing configured event handlers for lifecycle events. Usually created via LifecycleEventType.newHandler(LifecycleEventHandler) from event types in LifecycleEvents
